domains: Land use & land cover / fire / water

sources.name: Portal Brasileiro de Dados Abertos (dados.gov.br)
sources.description: Master federal catalog: search/list datasets, organizations, tags across all federal bodies (CKAN). Best single entry point to discover any federal dataset.
sources.limitations: Indexes metadata; data lives on agency portals. Coverage uneven by agency.

sources.name: Base dos Dados (BD)
sources.accessMethod: BigQuery SQL + Python/R/Stata pkgs + CSV download
sources.description: Hundreds of cleaned, cross-joinable public datasets (IBGE, RAIS, Comex, SIM, PIB) in one datalake with consistent municipality keys. Massively cuts ETL time.
sources.limitations: Mirror not primary; not all official tables present; >1TB/mo query incurs Google cost.

sources.name: IPEAdata
sources.rawDocs: http://www.ipeadata.gov.br/api/odata4/ (OData v4); R ipeadatar; Python ipeadatapy
sources.description: Thousands of macro, regional and social time series (GDP & state GDP, IPCA, IGP, FX, Gini, poverty) curated from primary sources, queryable by code.
sources.limitations: Aggregates multiple primary sources; some series lag. Always cite original source for audits.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência (Federal)
sources.description: Federal expenses, revenue, transfers (incl. to municipalities), servant salaries, sanctioned firms (CEIS/CNEP), social benefits, corporate cards, emendas.
sources.limitations: API rate-limited; for large volumes use bulk CSV.

sources.name: SICONFI
sources.description: Accounting & fiscal reports (RREO, RGF, DCA) + Matriz de Saldos Contabeis for all 5,570 municipalities + states: revenue, expense, debt, by entity/period.
sources.limitations: Self-reported; gaps where entities don't submit; retroactive revisions common.

sources.name: Tesouro Transparente
sources.description: Budget execution dashboards, public debt, Tesouro Direto bond prices/yields, federal cost system (SIC), fiscal statistics.
sources.limitations: Some panels aggregated; for rawer structured data use SICONFI.

sources.name: TransfereGov / Transferências Abertas
sources.description: Federal voluntary transfers, convênios, contratos de repasse to states/municipalities/NGOs: values, status, executors.
sources.limitations: Legacy Siconv vs modern contracts need manual entity joins. Manual browser check 2026-07-01: did not load.

sources.name: Siga Brasil
sources.description: Full federal budget (LOA): authorization vs execution by organ/function/program/action; emendas parlamentares.
sources.limitations: Interface heavy; learning curve.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Acre
sources.description: Receitas, despesas, convênios, contratos, servidores, repasses a municípios.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Alagoas
sources.description: Orçamento, receitas, despesas, repasses, pessoal, licitações, patrimônio, convênios. Has API/WebService.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Amapá
sources.description: Despesas, pessoal, emendas, áreas setoriais do Executivo.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module. Manual browser check 2026-07-01: works.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Amazonas
sources.description: Execução orçamentária/financeira, pagamentos por credor, pessoal. (2026 payroll inconsistency notice.)
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Bahia
sources.description: Execução financeira, pagamentos, licitações, contratos, pessoal. Pair with dados.ba.gov.br.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Ceará
sources.description: Programas, receita, despesa, servidores; cidadão chatbot.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Distrito Federal
sources.description: Arrecadação, gastos, remuneração, programas sociais.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Espírito Santo
sources.description: Gastos, receitas, pessoal, licitações, contratos, obras.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Goiás
sources.description: Convênios, repasses, folha, órgãos, benefícios, execução.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Maranhão
sources.description: Despesas, receitas, remuneração, transferências, contratos, licitações, obras. Linked dados.ma.gov.br.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module. Manual browser check 2026-07-01: works.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Mato Grosso
sources.description: Execução orçamentária e financeira do estado.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Mato Grosso do Sul
sources.description: Consultas por data/fornecedor/órgão: receitas, despesas.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Minas Gerais
sources.description: Compras, contratos, convênios, repasses, pessoal (LAI).
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Pará
sources.description: Planejamento, gestão fiscal, servidor, receita, despesa.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Paraíba
sources.description: Receitas, despesas, contratos, convênios, servidores (desde 2011).
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Paraná
sources.description: Planejamento, execução, receitas, gastos, transferências a municípios, remuneração.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Pernambuco
sources.description: RH, licitações, contratos, receita, despesa. Linked state open-data portal.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Piauí
sources.description: Servidores, despesas, receitas, licitações, contratos.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Rio de Janeiro
sources.description: Planejamento, orçamento, royalties do petróleo, receitas, despesas, servidores.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Rio Grande do Norte
sources.description: Orçamento, finanças, licitações, obras. New version at transparencia2.rn.gov.br.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Rio Grande do Sul
sources.description: Plataforma Pilas R$: receitas/despesas em tempo real + pessoal.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Rondônia
sources.description: Receitas, despesas, fornecedores, pessoal, participação social.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Roraima
sources.description: Remunerações, contratos, patrimônio.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Santa Catarina
sources.description: Receitas, despesas, diárias, materiais/serviços em tempo real.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Sergipe
sources.description: Execução financeira, receitas, despesas, licitações, contratos, RH.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - São Paulo
sources.description: Compras, contratos, repasses, obras, pessoal, receitas, despesas.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Tocantins
sources.description: Execução financeira, servidores, convênios.
sources.limitations: Most lack programmatic API; export format varies by module.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - São Paulo (capital)
sources.description: Receitas, despesas, orçamento, obras, GeoSampa, servidores. Pair with dados.prefeitura.sp.gov.br.
sources.limitations: Several use third-party vendors (e.g. portaltp) - fragile for scraping. Manual browser check 2026-07-01: works.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Rio de Janeiro (Contas Rio)
sources.description: Receita por fonte, folha, contratos por favorecido (CGM Rio).
sources.limitations: Several use third-party vendors (e.g. portaltp) - fragile for scraping. Manual browser check 2026-07-01: did not load.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Recife
sources.description: RH, despesas, receitas, módulos setoriais (PCR).
sources.limitations: Several use third-party vendors (e.g. portaltp) - fragile for scraping. Manual browser check 2026-07-01: works.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Porto Alegre
sources.description: Receita, despesas tempo real, folha, ISS, ITBI.
sources.limitations: Several use third-party vendors (e.g. portaltp) - fragile for scraping.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Salvador
sources.description: Gastos, receitas, execução por secretaria.
sources.limitations: Several use third-party vendors (e.g. portaltp) - fragile for scraping.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Vitória
sources.description: Despesas, receitas, contratos, salários, licitações. Open data via separate Dados Vitória API.
sources.limitations: Several use third-party vendors (e.g. portaltp) - fragile for scraping.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Vitória da Conquista
sources.description: Compras, receitas, despesas, pessoal, materiais, bens, PPA/LDO/LOA, contracts. PRIORITY lead-mapping city.
sources.limitations: Several use third-party vendors (e.g. portaltp) - fragile for scraping. Manual browser check 2026-07-01: works.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Belém
sources.description: Convênios, licitações, receita, despesa, saúde, educação.
sources.limitations: Several use third-party vendors (e.g. portaltp) - fragile for scraping.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Teresina
sources.description: Servidores, remuneração, receitas, despesas, contratos.
sources.limitations: Several use third-party vendors (e.g. portaltp) - fragile for scraping.

sources.name: Portal da Transparência - Rio Branco
sources.description: Obras, despesas, contratações, receitas, pessoal.
sources.limitations: Several use third-party vendors (e.g. portaltp) - fragile for scraping.

sources.name: PNCP - Portal Nacional de Contratações Públicas
sources.description: National registry of public bids, contracts, price records (atas), procurement plans across all government levels (Lei 14.133).
sources.limitations: Municipal adoption still ramping; older contracts in Comprasnet. Manual browser check 2026-07-01: did not load.

sources.name: Compras.gov.br (Dados Abertos)
sources.description: Federal purchases: biddings, contracts, suppliers, catalog items/prices (CATMAT/CATSER), supplier base (SICAF).
sources.limitations: Legacy endpoints; migrating to PNCP. High-volume API throttled.

sources.name: Painel de Preços
sources.description: Historic reference prices in public purchases. NOTE: official source reported update interruption from Jul/2025 - use with caution.
sources.limitations: Discontinued for current benchmarking.

sources.name: IBGE - API de Dados Agregados (SIDRA)
sources.accessMethod: API (REST v3) + web query builder + sidrapy/sidrar
sources.description: All IBGE survey tables: Census, population, IPCA/INPC, PIB municipal, PAM/PPM (agro/livestock), PNAD, industry/retail/services. Multidimensional filtering.
sources.limitations: Need correct table (agregado) code; census-tract queries may be chunked.

sources.name: IBGE - APIs de Serviços (Localidades, Malhas, CNAE, Nomes)
sources.description: Administrative divisions & codes, territorial mesh maps (multiple resolutions), CNAE classification, place names (BNGB), census first-names.

sources.name: IBGE Cidades / Panorama
sources.description: Per-municipality dashboards: population, area, GDP, education, health, territory in one profile.
sources.limitations: Presentation layer over SIDRA; use SIDRA/API for automation.

sources.name: SEADE Repositório / Municípios / População SP
sources.description: SP population & projections, fertility/vital stats, employment, education, health, economy at fine geography. IPVS vulnerability index.
sources.limitations: SP-only; layouts vary by dataset.

sources.name: IJSN - Instituto Jones dos Santos Neves
sources.description: ES analytical center: receitas, dengue, violence, conjuntura, regional indicators. Some data in Dados ES portal.
sources.limitations: Split between own panels and Dados ES.

sources.name: Fundação João Pinheiro - Estatísticas Públicas
sources.description: MG state & municipal GDP, sectoral value added, trade indicators, input-output matrices; R&D/patent/publication indexes.
sources.limitations: Some stats rely on slow academic disclosure. Manual browser check 2026-07-01: works.

sources.name: SEI Bahia - Superintendência de Estudos Econômicos e Sociais
sources.description: Bahia statistical/economic output: conjuntura, PIB, mercado de trabalho, thematic publications.
sources.limitations: Easier via publications/panels than raw datasets.

sources.name: IPARDES - BDEweb (Base de Dados do Estado)
sources.description: Physical, economic, social, financial & administrative indicators for all 399 PR municipalities; PIB, IDH, IPDM, emprego.
sources.limitations: Consolidated indicators, not transactional data.

sources.name: PDET - Microdados RAIS / CAGED / Novo CAGED
sources.accessMethod: FTP bulk download (or Base dos Dados mirror)
sources.description: Non-identified microdata of every formal employment bond: hires/separations, wages, CNAE, occupation (CBO), tenure, demographics by municipality.
sources.limitations: FTP not browser-supported (use FileZilla); identified data needs sigilo agreement. Caged-old vs Novo Caged methodology break.

sources.name: BCB - SGS (Séries Temporais)
sources.description: ~20k+ series: Selic, CDI, FX, IPCA, credit stock/rates, monetary aggregates, balance of payments, by numeric series code.
sources.limitations: Date range per call <=10y; need series codes.

sources.name: BCB - Portal de Dados Abertos (Olinda)
sources.description: PIX statistics (incl. municipal), Open Finance, IFData (bank balance sheets), means-of-payment, PTAX FX, institutions registry, Focus expectations, credit.
sources.limitations: Each service has own OData endpoint; check resource & license.

sources.name: CVM - Dados Abertos
sources.description: Listed-company filings (ITR/DFP), investment funds daily quotas & portfolios, regulated entities, informes diários FI.
sources.limitations: Flat-file model; large files by theme directory.

sources.name: B3 - Cotações Históricas / Market Data
sources.description: End-of-day historical quotes (free), indices (Ibovespa); real-time/tick data is commercial.
sources.limitations: Most granular & real-time data paywalled.

sources.name: Receita Federal - CNPJ Dados Abertos
sources.description: Complete registry of all Brazilian companies: name, CNAE, address, status, partners (QSA), capital, Simples/MEI flags. ~60M+ establishments, 160M+ records.
sources.limitations: 20GB+; needs ETL/DB. No transactional API (use 3rd-party APIs). No graph API for beneficial ownership.

sources.name: Receita Federal - Dados Abertos (geral)
sources.description: Beyond CNPJ: Simples Nacional/MEI lists, immune/exempt entities, customs data, tax-collection stats, CAFIR (rural properties).

sources.name: Mapa de Empresas
sources.description: Panels on company openings, closures, stock, time-to-open, business environment dynamics.
sources.limitations: Analytical panel; for microdata use CNPJ/Juntas.

sources.name: Juntas Comerciais (diretório DREI)
sources.description: National directory of state Juntas Comerciais (index to find the competent junta per UF).
sources.limitations: Directory, not a registry DB; data fragmented across 27 juntas.

sources.name: Junta Comercial - JUCESP
sources.rawDocs: service portal; mostly no open API
sources.description: Company registrations, branches, nature/sector/location of new SP businesses.
sources.limitations: Service-oriented; partner detail often paid; not bulk-friendly.

sources.name: Junta Comercial - JUCEAC
sources.rawDocs: service portal; mostly no open API
sources.description: Mercantile registry & Redesim integration in Acre.
sources.limitations: Service-oriented; partner detail often paid; not bulk-friendly.

sources.name: Junta Comercial - JUCAP
sources.rawDocs: service portal; mostly no open API
sources.description: Junta comercial services & process consultation in Amapá.
sources.limitations: Service-oriented; partner detail often paid; not bulk-friendly. Manual browser check 2026-07-01: works.

sources.name: Junta Comercial - JUCEB
sources.rawDocs: service portal; mostly no open API
sources.description: Business registry & digital services in Bahia.
sources.limitations: Service-oriented; partner detail often paid; not bulk-friendly.

sources.name: Junta Comercial - JUCEMG
sources.rawDocs: service portal; mostly no open API
sources.description: Company opening/alteration/registration of acts in MG.
sources.limitations: Service-oriented; partner detail often paid; not bulk-friendly.

sources.name: Junta Comercial - JUCERJA
sources.rawDocs: service portal; mostly no open API
sources.description: Web protocol, simplified certificate, registration of acts in RJ.
sources.limitations: Service-oriented; partner detail often paid; not bulk-friendly.

sources.name: Comex Stat
sources.granularity: NCM x country x UF x municipality (declarant) x mode
sources.description: Official exports/imports: FOB value, net kg, quantity, by product (NCM/SH4), partner, state, municipality of declaring firm, transport, customs unit.
sources.limitations: Municipality = firm's fiscal domicile, not production origin; bulk CSVs too large for spreadsheets. Manual browser check 2026-07-01: works.

sources.name: SEFAZ-PR - Receita Tributária
sources.description: ICMS, IPVA, ITCMD collections, federal transfers, tax waivers by municipality (PR).
sources.limitations: Tax-label structural changes in 2024.

sources.name: INCRA - Acervo Fundiário (SIGEF/SNCI geo)
sources.description: Certified rural property boundaries (public & private), agrarian-reform settlements, quilombola territories as GIS layers.
sources.limitations: Servers unstable; some downloads now behind gov.br.

sources.name: SIGEF - Sistema de Gestão Fundiária
sources.description: Georeferencing certification of rural properties, parcel coordinates/vertices, certification status.
sources.authRequired: gov.br prata/ouro for full consult; cert for operation
sources.limitations: Focus on certification, not all cadastres.

sources.name: SICAR / CAR - Cadastro Ambiental Rural
sources.rawDocs: public consult + SHP per municipality/UF; Conecta API (gov-only OAuth)
sources.accessMethod: web consult + SHP download (+ Conecta API for gov)
sources.description: Self-declared rural property boundaries, legal reserve, APP, land-use polygons (~6M+ properties). Query by CPF/CNPJ via Conecta (restricted).
sources.limitations: Self-declared, overlaps common; raw bulk via download, not open API.

sources.name: SNCR - Sistema Nacional de Cadastro Rural (API)
sources.description: Query rural property status, by code or owner CPF/CNPJ; download CCIR; titularity, fiscal modules, classification.
sources.limitations: Built for institutional integration.

sources.name: Meu Imóvel Rural
sources.description: Unified view of a holder's properties across CAR+SNCR+SIGEF, georeferenced; download CCIR, CAR receipt.
sources.limitations: Only logged-in owner's own properties.

sources.name: ONR - Registradores (cartórios de imóveis)
sources.description: Property registry certificates (matrícula), prior search, e-protocol across participating registry offices nationwide.
sources.license: Paid per act; not open data
sources.limitations: Fees apply; coverage depends on cartório participation. Manual browser check 2026-07-01: did not load.

sources.name: MAPA - Dados Abertos (Agrofit, SIGSIF, etc.)
sources.description: Registered pesticides (Agrofit), federally inspected plants (SIGSIF/SISBI), agric. defense, seed/cultivar registries, zoning.
sources.limitations: Spread across many subsystems.

sources.name: CONAB - Informações Agropecuárias
sources.description: Crop forecasts (safras), supply/stocks, minimum prices (PGPM), production costs, market price series.

sources.name: CEPEA/ESALQ-USP - Indicadores de Preços
sources.description: Benchmark daily price indicators (cattle, soy, corn, coffee, sugar) widely used in contracts.
sources.limitations: Not government; attribution required. Manual browser check 2026-07-01: works.

sources.name: INPE - TerraBrasilis (PRODES/DETER)
sources.description: Official deforestation polygons & rates (PRODES), near-real-time alerts (DETER), by biome & Legal Amazon. BiomasBR program.
sources.limitations: Attend to 'PRODES year' & per-program methodology.

sources.name: INPE - Programa Queimadas / BDQueimadas
sources.description: Active fire foci & burned-area products for Brazil & Latin America, spatial & temporal series.
sources.limitations: Satellite focus != confirmed surface fire.

sources.name: MapBiomas
sources.domain: Land use & land cover / fire / water
sources.description: Annual land-cover/use maps (1985+), deforestation & regeneration, fire scars, water surface, mining, by pixel/municipality/biome.
sources.limitations: Classification not ground truth; NGO (not official).

sources.name: ANA - SNIRH / HidroWeb
sources.description: River flow/level, rainfall, water quality, reservoir levels, water-use grants, by station & basin.
sources.limitations: Station data needs consistency treatment.

sources.name: INMET - BDMEP
sources.description: Historical & automatic weather-station data: temperature, rainfall, humidity, wind, pressure; forecasts/warnings.
sources.limitations: Station metadata/standardization to check.

sources.name: IBAMA - Dados Abertos (embargos, autuações)
sources.description: Embargoed areas, fines/infractions, deforestation authorizations; cross-referencable with CAR/SIGEF.

sources.name: GeoSGB - Serviço Geológico do Brasil
sources.description: Geology, hydrogeology, geophysics, geotechnics, risk/disaster maps in official geospatial environment.
sources.limitations: Multiple bases with distinct scales/coverage.

sources.name: INDE - Infraestrutura Nacional de Dados Espaciais
sources.description: Federated catalog of official geospatial layers from dozens of producers (IBGE, INCRA, ANA, ICMBio); discovery + OGC services.
sources.limitations: Metadata quality varies.

sources.name: IBGE - Downloads Geociências / Malhas / Geodésico
sources.description: Geology, relief, biomes, cartography, territorial meshes (UF/município/setor), geodesic network — base layers for geocoding & maps.
sources.limitations: Watch boundary changes for temporal comparability.

sources.name: Geoportal IDE Bahia
sources.description: Official Bahia spatial-data infrastructure catalog; metadata search for state geospatial layers.
sources.limitations: Catalog/service; extraction depends on associated service.

sources.name: GeoSampa
sources.description: Full municipal GIS: cadastral lots, zoning, IPTU value zones, street network, transport, geology, environment layers.
sources.limitations: - Manual browser check 2026-07-01: works.

sources.name: BHMap Geoserver
sources.description: BH spatial layers: zoning boundaries, hydrography, transport nodes, hazard mapping.
sources.limitations: Best via QGIS/ArcGIS for full vectors.

sources.name: Geoweb Vitória
sources.description: Apps, panels, maps & geographic data for managing the ES capital.
sources.limitations: Not all layers directly downloadable from home.

sources.name: DATASUS - TabNet
sources.description: Mortality (SIM), births (SINASC), notifiable diseases (SINAN), hospital/ambulatory production (SIH/SIA), immunization, by municipality.
sources.limitations: Legacy DBC format; TabNet UI dated; PySUS eases access.

sources.name: DATASUS - Transferência de Arquivos
sources.description: Raw historical files for SIM, SINASC, SIH, CNES etc. for robust ETL.
sources.limitations: Legacy formats need conversion.

sources.name: DATASUS - FTP S3 Mirror (community)
sources.rawUrl: various S3 mirrors (e.g. via microdatasus R pkg)
sources.description: High-speed mirror of SIM/SINASC/SIH/CNES with parallel sync & transaction logs.
sources.limitations: Community-maintained (not official); needs DBC parsers.

sources.name: CNES - Estabelecimentos de Saúde
sources.description: Every health facility (public & private): type, beds, equipment, services, professionals, location. Core for healthcare-enablement mapping.
sources.limitations: Name/unit normalization needed; known cadastral inconsistencies.

sources.name: DATASUS - API Dados Abertos
sources.description: Modern REST endpoints over selected health datasets (CNES, professionals, some epidemiology) without TabNet.
sources.limitations: Coverage narrower than full DATASUS.

sources.name: ANS - Dados Abertos (saúde suplementar)
sources.description: Health-plan operators registry & financials, beneficiary counts by operator/municipality/plan, TISS, complaints.
sources.limitations: Personal microdata not public.

sources.name: ANVISA - Dados Abertos
sources.description: Registered medicines/cosmetics/food, drug prices (CMED), adverse events, establishment authorizations, imports.
sources.limitations: - Manual browser check 2026-07-01: works.

sources.name: INEP - Microdados (hub)
sources.description: Hub for all INEP microdata: Censo Escolar, ENEM, Higher-Ed Census, SAEB, plus dictionaries & questionnaires.
sources.limitations: Anonymization limits some individual cross-joins; large files.

sources.name: INEP - Censo Escolar (microdados)
sources.description: Enrollments, schools, classes, teachers, basic-ed infrastructure indicators by school/municipality.
sources.limitations: Variables change over time; check annual layouts.

sources.name: INEP - ENEM / Censo Ed. Superior / IDEB
sources.description: ENEM scores/items/questionnaires; Higher-Ed Census (IES, courses, faculty, vacancies); IDEB results & targets by network/municipality.
sources.limitations: Recent ENEM simplified for data protection.

sources.name: CAPES - Dados Abertos / Catálogo de Teses
sources.description: Grad-program evaluation, theses/dissertations catalog, scholarships, production, by program/institution/area.
sources.limitations: Very heterogeneous across datasets. Link check 2026-07-01: automated checker returned 403/timeout/fetch error; manual browser verification recommended before production use.

sources.name: CNJ - DataJud (API Pública)
sources.description: Public metadata for judicial cases nationwide: class, subject, court, movements (excludes sealed cases & party personal data).
sources.limitations: Per-tribunal endpoints; metadata only; bulk raw-event consumption limited.

sources.name: CNJ - Justiça em Números
sources.description: Aggregate judiciary performance: caseload, clearance, costs, productivity, by court/segment.
sources.limitations: Aggregate; for case-level use DataJud.

sources.name: STF - Jurisprudência / Corte Aberta
sources.description: Search of STF acórdãos, decisions, súmulas, full text; Corte Aberta panels on distribution/decisions/repercussão geral.
sources.limitations: Research-oriented; not bulk structured download. Manual browser check 2026-07-01: works.

sources.name: STJ - Portal de Dados Abertos
sources.description: Cases in progress, full texts & metadata of terminative decisions/acórdãos, plus jurisdictional & administrative datasets.
sources.limitations: Check per-dataset docs; not all full history.

sources.name: LexML / Planalto - Legislação
sources.description: Federal (and some state) laws, decrees, normative acts with metadata & full text; LexML structured search.

sources.name: TSE - Portal de Dados Abertos
sources.description: Candidates & results to polling section, campaign finance (donations/expenses), electorate by municipality/zone, ballot-box logs.
sources.limitations: Large per-election files; migrated from old RDE in 2022.

sources.name: Câmara dos Deputados - Dados Abertos (API)
sources.description: Deputies, bills, votes, committees, speeches, parliamentary expense quota (cota) spending.

sources.name: Senado Federal - Dados Abertos (API)
sources.description: Senators, legislative matters, votings, committees, plus Siga Brasil budget link.

sources.name: MDS - VIS DATA 3 / Cadastro Único / Bolsa Família
sources.description: Cadastro Único coverage, Bolsa Família/BPC/Auxílio beneficiaries & values by municipality, SUAS network, poverty indicators.
sources.authRequired: None for aggregate; token for some APIs
sources.limitations: Individual-level CadÚnico protected; only aggregates open.

sources.name: MDS - Observatório do Cadastro Único
sources.description: Panel for CadÚnico information management and IVCAD.
sources.limitations: Aggregate; identified extraction needs authorization.

sources.name: ANEEL - Dados Abertos
sources.description: Generation plants, distributed generation (micro/mini), tariffs, distributors, consumption by class/region, SIGEL grid, ombudsman.
sources.limitations: Excellent but spread across many specialized datasets; SIGEL layers occasionally offline.

sources.name: ANP - Dados Abertos / CDP
sources.rawDocs: thematic portal + CDP (Consulta de Dados Públicos)
sources.description: Weekly fuel-price survey by station/municipality, oil & gas production by field, reserves, derivatives sales, biofuels, E&P, incidents.
sources.limitations: New CDP portal (replacing legacy CPL) uses dynamic session tags; catalog spread across themes.

sources.name: EPE - Webmap / Balanço Energético; ONS
sources.description: National Energy Balance (BEN), generation/load by subsystem, reservoir levels, transmission (ONS), planning geodata (EPE).

sources.name: ANAC - Dados Abertos / DataSearch
sources.description: Air traffic by airport/route, actual flight paths (VRA), on-time performance, tariffs, dynamic ticket pricing, registered aircraft, market share.
sources.limitations: Some catalog needs thematic navigation; DSL query engine can be slow.

sources.name: ANTT - Dados Abertos / Monitriip
sources.description: Road freight (RNTRC)/passenger, toll & traffic, intercity bus telemetry & ticket sales (Monitriip), rail cargo, concessions, enforcement.
sources.limitations: Some datasets discontinued; check validity; Monitriip files are heavy.

sources.name: ANTAQ - Estatístico Aquaviário
sources.description: Port throughput & waterway statistics, anuário panels.
sources.limitations: Web/panel fragile; automation may need scraping. Manual browser check 2026-07-01: did not load.

sources.name: DNIT - Condição de Rodovias (ICM)
sources.description: Federal road network & condition: maintenance index (ICM), surface roughness (IRI), paving projects.
sources.limitations: Spatial coords occasionally misaligned with regional cartography.

sources.name: ANATEL - Dados Abertos / Mosaico
sources.description: Broadband/mobile access by municipality & technology, coverage, spectrum stations, complaints, operator market share.
sources.limitations: Offer dispersed across 'Dados', 'Painéis' & 'Dados Abertos'.

sources.name: INPI - Dados Abertos / Busca (pePI)
sources.description: Patents, trademarks, industrial designs, software registrations; filing stats; per-record search via pePI.
sources.limitations: Bulk open data limited & expanding; coverage caveats on older acervo.

sources.name: CNPq - Painel Lattes / Plataforma Lattes
sources.description: Researcher CVs (Lattes), aggregate panels by area/region/institution; research groups directory.
sources.limitations: No clean bulk API; scraping constraints.

sources.name: MJSP - SINESP / Estatísticas de Segurança Pública
sources.description: Homicides, robberies, vehicle theft, gender violence, weapons seizures, prison population, by state/municipality.
sources.limitations: State reporting heterogeneity; comparability depends on standardization.

sources.name: SSP-SP - Estatísticas de Criminalidade
sources.description: Monthly crimes against life/property, sexual violence, drug infractions, police productivity (SP).
sources.limitations: No API; historical data split across pages.

sources.name: Fórum Brasileiro de Segurança Pública - Anuário
sources.description: Consolidated crime/violence statistics (Anuário), often filling official gaps.
sources.limitations: NGO compilation, not official.

sources.name: Ministério do Turismo - Estatísticas e Indicadores
sources.description: Arrivals, tourism FX revenue/expense, financing, indicators for Brazil & abroad.
sources.limitations: Aggregates panels/sources; not all downloadable microdata.

sources.name: Ministério da Cultura - Painel PNAB (Aldir Blanc)
sources.description: Territorial execution of the Aldir Blanc cultural policy: repasses & monitoring.
sources.limitations: Program-specific; not a general culture catalog.

sources.name: Dados Abertos SP
sources.description: Unified SP state portal (Seade + secretariats); economy, health, education, security, transport.
sources.limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

sources.name: Portal de Dados Abertos da Bahia
sources.description: State CKAN: finance, procurement, convênios; pair with SEI & IDE Bahia.
sources.limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org. Manual browser check 2026-07-01: works.

sources.name: Dados ES
sources.description: State CKAN/API: social, economic, administrative datasets; IJSN feeds.
sources.limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

sources.name: Dados Abertos do Paraná
sources.description: State portal backed by BDEweb: PIB, IDH, IPDM, population, emprego, agro, finance.
sources.limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

sources.name: Dados RS
sources.agency: Governo do Rio Grande do Sul
sources.description: State open-data portal for social reuse; quality varies by org.
sources.limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

sources.name: Dados Abertos da Prefeitura de São Paulo
sources.description: PMSP CKAN: mobility, education, health, inspections, urbanism, finance.
sources.limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

sources.name: DATA.RIO / Datalake Rio
sources.description: City urban/geo/social/operational data; municipal datalake integration.
sources.limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

sources.name: Dados Abertos do Recife
sources.description: CKAN: health, education, environment, CTTU traffic, licenses, LAI requests.
sources.limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

sources.name: Dados Abertos da PBH
sources.description: CKAN: wide variety of urban & administrative datasets.
sources.limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

sources.name: Fortaleza Dados Abertos
sources.description: CKAN: hundreds of datasets - health, mobility, education, traffic, management.
sources.limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

sources.name: Dados Abertos Curitiba
sources.description: 156 requests, e-Saúde, alvarás, economy, transport, municipal policies.
sources.limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org. Link check 2026-07-01: automated checker returned 403/timeout/fetch error; manual browser verification recommended before production use.

sources.name: Dados Abertos Porto Alegre
sources.description: Open-government datasets on the city & administration.
sources.limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.

sources.name: Dados Abertos PMV (Vitória)
sources.description: Municipal open-data API (JSON) with docs; pair with Geoweb & transparência.
sources.limitations: Coverage/maturity varies by publishing org.
